raw_payload:
{
    "name": "XTF Starter Admin",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "type": "admin",
    "description": "Reference admin theme built on XTF services and XMF Widgets. Features sidebar navigation, KPI dashboard, dark mode, and module widget grid.",
    "author": "XOOPS Theme Framework",
    "license": "GPL-2.0-or-later",
    "xoops_min": "2.5.12",
    "xtf_min": "0.1.0",

    "slots": [
        "head",
        "sidebar",
        "breadcrumb",
        "dashboard",
        "page",
        "widgets",
        "footer",
        "customizer"
    ],

    "slot_templates": {
        "head": "xotpl/xo_head.tpl",
        "sidebar": "xotpl/xo_sidebar.tpl",
        "breadcrumb": "xotpl/xo_breadcrumb.tpl",
        "dashboard": "xotpl/xo_dashboard.tpl",
        "page": "xotpl/xo_page.tpl",
        "widgets": "xotpl/xo_widgets.tpl",
        "footer": "xotpl/xo_footer.tpl",
        "customizer": "xotpl/xo_customizer.tpl"
    },

    "slot_groups": {
        "main_content": {
            "slots": ["breadcrumb", "page"],
            "wrapper": "div",
            "class": "xadf-content"
        },
        "admin_body": {
            "slots": ["sidebar", "@main_content"],
            "wrapper": "div",
            "class": "xadf-layout"
        }
    },

    "render_order": ["head", "@admin_body", "footer", "customizer"],

    "assets": {
        "css": [
            "css/xadf.css",
            "css/dark.css",
            "css/fixes.css",
            "css/marketplace.css"
        ],
        "js": [
            "js/theme.js",
            "js/dashboard.js",
            "js/charts.js",
            "js/customizer.js",
            "js/marketplace.js"
        ]
    },

    "options": {
        "darkMode": true,
        "sidebarCollapse": true,
        "dashboardWidgets": true,
        "chartSupport": true,
        "customizerPanel": true
    },

    "preferences": {
        "dark_mode": {
            "default": false,
            "user_overridable": true,
            "label": "Dark Mode",
            "type": "boolean"
        },
        "sidebar_collapsed": {
            "default": false,
            "user_overridable": true,
            "label": "Sidebar Collapsed",
            "type": "boolean"
        },
        "color_scheme": {
            "default": "blue",
            "user_overridable": true,
            "label": "Color Scheme",
            "type": "select",
            "choices": ["blue", "green", "purple", "orange", "slate"]
        },
        "font_size": {
            "default": "default",
            "user_overridable": true,
            "label": "Font Size",
            "type": "select",
            "choices": ["small", "default", "large"]
        }
    },

    "tokens": {
        "color.primary": "#2563eb",
        "color.primary-hover": "#1d4ed8",
        "color.primary-light": "#dbeafe",
        "color.secondary": "#64748b",
        "color.success": "#16a34a",
        "color.warning": "#d97706",
        "color.danger": "#dc2626",
        "color.info": "#0891b2",
        "color.bg": "#f1f5f9",
        "color.bg-card": "#ffffff",
        "color.bg-sidebar": "#1e293b",
        "color.text": "#1e293b",
        "color.text-muted": "#64748b",
        "color.text-sidebar": "#cbd5e1",
        "color.text-sidebar-active": "#ffffff",
        "color.border": "#e2e8f0",
        "color.shadow": "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
        "font.family": "system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif",
        "font.size-base": "0.9375rem",
        "font.size-sm": "0.8125rem",
        "font.size-lg": "1.0625rem",
        "font.size-xl": "1.25rem",
        "font.size-2xl": "1.5rem",
        "font.size-3xl": "1.875rem",
        "font.weight-normal": "400",
        "font.weight-medium": "500",
        "font.weight-semibold": "600",
        "font.weight-bold": "700",
        "font.line-height": "1.5",
        "spacing.xs": "0.25rem",
        "spacing.sm": "0.5rem",
        "spacing.md": "1rem",
        "spacing.lg": "1.5rem",
        "spacing.xl": "2rem",
        "spacing.2xl": "3rem",
        "radius.sm": "4px",
        "radius.md": "8px",
        "radius.lg": "12px",
        "radius.full": "9999px",
        "shadow.sm": "0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)",
        "shadow.md": "0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
        "shadow.lg": "0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
        "layout.sidebar-width": "260px",
        "layout.sidebar-collapsed-width": "64px",
        "layout.header-height": "56px",
        "layout.gap": "1.5rem"
    }
}
